info.title: Starting the cluster services for one node

abstract.para: Starting the cluster services means starting &pace; and &corosync;. The node becomes an active member of the cluster again.

topic.para: Perform this procedure on the node you want to start.

step.para: Log in to the node either as the &rootuser; user or as a user with sudo privileges.
If you rebooted the node, check whether the cluster services started automatically:
If the cluster services started automatically, both &pace; and &corosync; will be active.
If the cluster services didn't start automatically, start them manually:
Check the status of the cluster:
The node should be Online. It might also have the status standby. If the node is in standby mode, it won't be able to run resources again until you take it out of standby mode.
